tools.Name: Free Claude Code
tools.Description: A lightweight proxy that routes Claude Code API calls to various providers including NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, and local LLM runners.
tools.Use_Case: Using Claude Code CLI or VSCode extension without needing an Anthropic API key.

tools.Name: ML Intern
tools.Description: An autonomous AI engineer designed to read research papers, train models, and ship ML code using the Hugging Face ecosystem.
tools.Use_Case: Automating ML research, coding, and deployment tasks.

tools.Name: OpenSRE
tools.Description: An open-source framework for building AI SRE agents that investigate production incidents by correlating logs, metrics, and traces.
tools.Use_Case: Automating incident response and root-cause analysis on infrastructure.
